name: cli-budget-exhausted
description: Inbound from `cli:local` arrives at an agent group whose `daily_token_cap` is 100 and whose `agent_turns` already shows 200 tokens used today. The container manager's budget gate refuses to spawn, writes a 'budget exhausted' Chat reply to `messages_out`, and the delivery loop fans it back to `cli/stdin`. Re-issuing the same inbound within the dedup window does NOT generate a second reply.
